_comment: Centrally-managed per-repo Checkov exceptions. All entries require SWG approval and a documented justification per check. skip_check excludes a check entirely. soft_fail_on lets a check run and appear in output, but only fails the build if Checkov's mapped severity for it is HIGH or CRITICAL - otherwise it soft-fails.

skip_check.justification: TODO: Link to SWG Confluence page
